title: Tablist Filters
body: This mod adds a couple of commands to control the color of the name of your friends in servers; This is purely clientside, so you can put "/tablist add DrEggman green", and the name "DrEggman" will always appear green when playing in any server with them! The colors supported can be found in https://minecraft.fandom.com/wiki/Formatting_codes under the colors area; You have to use the color "name", so "red", "light_purple", "gold" etc.   This mod requires you to have the fabric API This mod is fully clientisde Use "/tablist add [name] [color]" to add a name to the list. Defaults to gold if the color introduced isn't valid. Use "/tablist remove [name]" to remove a name from the list. Use "/tablist deactivate [true/false]" to disable it or enable it; "true" means disabled; it's false by default, and it's saved per session. Showcase: https://youtu.be/ZWN5ABzCO6w
